title: Reality SWAP
description: a mod that allows you to change the relities in minecraft every 5 minutes
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b086a7caaccc2ce88d6191c3cbf95602e26e69e0_0.webp)

Discord • Twitter

# Reality Swap **Reality Swap** is a mod created for **Soarinng**, where the world changes radically every 5 minutes. Get ready to survive in a controlled chaos with **dynamic realities** that completely shift your Minecraft experience. > 🌍 **Each reality brings unique challenges and mechanics.** > 🧠 **Adapt or perish.** --- ## ⚙️ How It Works - Every 5 minutes, a **random reality** is activated. - Realities can affect physics, controls, world rules, player size, visuals, and more. - Some realities help you. Most just want you to suffer. --- ## 🌀 Available Realities - 🎢 **Rotating Screen** Your entire screen rotates or flips. Good luck navigating like this. - 🌕 **Lunar Gravity** Every block you break or step on starts floating upward... are we in space? - 🔁 **Left-Handed Mode (WASD?)** Your movement keys are swapped. Time to relearn how to walk. - 💎 **All is Wealth** Walking turns the ground into gold. Mobs explode into golden nuggets! - 🌪️ **Tremors** Every 10 seconds the earth shakes. Hold on tight! - 🧝‍♂️ **Mictia POV** You become a smurf. Smaller size, same courage. --- ## 🎥 Preview Video
Watch showcase [![Reality Swap Showcase](https://img.youtube.com/vi/30RoyAK44pI/0.jpg)](https://youtu.be/30RoyAK44pI)
--- ## ✅ Requirements - **Minecraft 1.21.1** - **Fabric Loader** - Fully **multiplayer compatible** - Required dependencies: - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) --- ## ❤️ Credits
Show This mod was entirely developed by **[SrMast3r_](https://x.com/_SrMaster_)** Huge thanks to: - The amazing **Soarinng** community - The developers of Fabric, GeckoLib and supporting mods - The brave testers who survived every twisted reality
--- > 🌀 **Reality Swap** — When your world changes, you must change with it.
